name: Домен Порядка
description: The Order Domain represents discipline, as well as devotion to the laws that govern a society, an institution, or a philosophy. Clerics of Order meditate on logic and justice as they serve their gods. Clerics of Order believe that well-crafted laws establish legitimate hierarchies, and those selected by law to lead must be obeyed. Those who obey must do so to the best of their ability, and if those who lead fail to protect the law, they must be replaced. In this manner, law weaves a web of obligations that create order and security in a chaotic multiverse.

features.name: Order Domain Spells
features.description: Your connection to this divine domain ensures you always have certain spells ready. When you reach a Cleric level specified in the Order Domain Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Voice of Authority
features.description: You can invoke the power of law to embolden an ally to attack. Immediately after you cast a spell with a spell slot of level 1 or higher that targets an ally, that ally can use a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make one weapon attack against a target of your choice that you can see. If the spell targets more than one ally, you choose the ally who can make the attack.

features.name: Order's Demand
features.description: As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can expend a use of your Channel Divinity to exert an intimidating presence over others. Each creature of your choice that can see or hear you within 30 feet of you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of your next turn or until the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creature takes any damage. You can also cause any of the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} creatures to drop what they are holding when they fail the saving throw.

features.name: Embodiment of the Law
features.description: You have become remarkably adept at channeling magical energy to compel others. If you cast a spell of the Enchantment school using a spell slot of level 1 or higher, you can change the spell's casting time to a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} for this casting, provided the spell's casting time is normally an action. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

features.name: Order's Wrath
features.description: Enemies you designate for destruction wilt under the combined efforts of you and your allies. If you deal your Divine Strike damage to a creature on your turn, you can curse that creature until the start of your next turn. The next time one of your allies hits the cursed creature with an attack, the target also takes {@damage 2d8} Psychic damage, and the curse ends.
